zh-CN.name: 阿姨
zh-CN.intro: 阿姨是妈妈的姐妹，她像妈妈一样温柔，会陪我们玩，给我们讲故事。

story.title: 🏡去阿姨家玩
story.body: 小猫咪今天要去看望阿姨。阿姨家在城里的另一边，小猫咪坐妈妈的车去。一进门，阿姨就给了小猫咪一个大大的拥抱，还给它穿上了自己小时候的花围裙。阿姨和小猫咪一起做好吃的：揉一揉面团，擀一擀面皮，压出各种各样的小饼干。小猫咪最喜欢小星星形状的饼干。烤好后，整个屋子都香喷喷的。小猫咪尝了一口，哇，真好吃！吃完饼干，阿姨抱着小猫咪坐在摇椅上，给它讲了一个长长的故事，故事里有一只勇敢的小兔子。小猫咪听着听着，慢慢地闭上了眼睛。在梦里，它和阿姨一起在草地上放风筝。小猫咪觉得，阿姨的怀抱和妈妈的一样温暖，它好喜欢阿姨呀。

knowledge.title: 阿姨是谁？
knowledge.body: 阿姨是妈妈的姐妹，或者爸爸的姐妹。阿姨很爱我们，会陪我们玩，给我们做好吃的。有时候阿姨也会像妈妈一样照顾我们，是第二个妈妈。

en.name: Aunt
en.intro: An aunt is your mommy’s sister. She is kind and loving, just like mommy. She plays with you and tells you stories.

story.title: 🏡Visiting Auntie
story.body: The little kitten went to visit Auntie today. Auntie lived on the other side of town, so the kitten rode in Mama’s car. When they arrived, Auntie gave the kitten a big, warm hug. She even let the kitten wear her old flowery apron from when she was small. Auntie and the kitten made cookies together: they kneaded the dough, rolled it out, and cut it into little star shapes. The whole house smelled so good when they were baking. The kitten took a bite—yummy! After the cookies, Auntie held the kitten in the rocking chair and told a long story about a brave little rabbit. The kitten listened and listened until its eyes slowly closed. In its dream, it flew a kite with Auntie in a big green field. The kitten thought, Auntie’s arms are just as warm as Mama’s. It loved Auntie so much.

knowledge.title: Who is an aunt?
knowledge.body: An aunt is the sister of your mother or father. Sometimes a close family friend is also called auntie. Aunts love us, play with us, and cook yummy food for us. They take care of us like a second mom.
